brand_tone: Warm, Professional, Trustworthy, Caring, Organised, Modern but not flashy

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#17324D]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. Prevent text collisions by maintaining large inner padding on cards.
spacing_and_layout.button_radius: rounded-full (for public site CTAs) and rounded-xl (for internal portal)

public_website_hero.style: Clean layout with generous whitespace, overlapping imagery with rounded edges, subtle background shapes using accent colors (#D9F1F4 and #D8E6D5). Not fully transparent nav overlay.
public_website_hero.image_overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#17324D]/60 via-[#17324D]/30 to-transparent for legibility if using background images.

public_cards.style: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-[#E4E8EB] p-8 shadow-sm transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md

internal_dashboard.style: Dense but calm. Cards use bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E4E8EB] p-6. Status chips use icon + label with light background (e.g., bg-[#D8E6D5] text-[#1F8F5F]).

headers.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E4E8EB] sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#17324D] border border-[#E4E8EB] hover:bg-[#F8FAFA] hover:border-[#163A70]/20

components.forms: Use Shadcn customized. Inputs should have bg-white border-[#E4E8EB] rounded-xl text-[#17324D] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F5C5E]/20 focus:border-[#0F5C5E].
components.status_chips: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium gap-1.5

public_hero.description: Hero section primary visual - warm, trustworthy caregiving moment.

about_us_team.description: Team collaboration image for About or Recruitment page.

modern_facility.description: Used for background context, Contact page, or facility highlights.

patient_care_secondary.description: Secondary visual for Services or Testimonials section.

professional_doctors.alt: Doctor and nurse engaged in conversation
professional_doctors.description: Internal portal login background or Compliance page banner.

animation_and_motion.hover_states: Soft scaling (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1) for cards. Color transition on buttons.
animation_and_motion.dashboard_loading: Use skeleton loaders matching the card radii (rounded-2xl) with a soft pulse using #F8FAFA to #E4E8EB.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against #F8FAFA and #FFFFFF meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-[#17324D] for primary readability.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a clear focus ring: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0F5C5E]/50 focus:ring-offset-2.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='apply-now-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Always use the defined colors by extending Tailwind config. Do not use generic tailwind colors like 'blue-500' unless it maps exactly to the brand palette.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Ensure fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
The public marketing pages MUST use generous padding (p-12 to p-24) and large border radii (rounded-3xl).
The internal SaaS portal MUST use tighter grids (gap-6) but still maintain soft radii (rounded-2xl) and no harsh shadows.
Do not use generic Shadcn components out of the box. Modify their radius and colors to match this guideline.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media. Do not use generic placeholders.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements for robust testing.
